name: Infernal Paradise University (IPU)
description:
Welcome to Infernal Paradise University, a 'minus' world where students are totally normal at this fun university (and alt universe of the original RetroSpecter universe)!

Students:

Metro (RetroSpecter's alt), a cyan strong muscley quarterback who is secretly gay for Mace and is a short-fused muscle-head!

Maku (Sakuroma's alt), hot pink curvy yet strong cheerleader for the Infernal football team!

Mizzy (Izzurious's alt), a minty green skinny yet toned nerd who's obsessed with himself, his projects, and pink/red women!

Minsation (Insation's alt), a mostly red and black colored woman who's scarily strong and also tends to eat quite a bit! She tends to like making bets (as far as I can tell with my recent playthrough of Part 2)!

Hinus/Mivemine (Hivemine's alt), a mostly purple bee woman who is.. well, I don't really know what else to say but greedy!

Mace (Ace/Kamex's alt), an anxious light blue ice dragon that doesn't seem to have legs and is also gay for Metro!

Teachers/Authorities:

Mocean (Atrocean's alt), a fat neon green anthro angler fish who is the cold mean 'dean' of Infernal Paradise who also does most of the university's announcements!

Mozzy (Dozirc's alt), an orange and gray robot, who also doesn't have legs apparently, that also helps with Matreus's announcements.. by.. sleeping! Yes.. very important..

Please consider joining my discord: https://discord.gg/YSv4tJQmuE

Yes I do take commissions

Yes they are all free (for now)

Yes you can request anything (yes anything; bots, art, nsfw, no long animations tho)

No the art is not mine this time

Yes I will update the bot later so it's more accurate (yeah but a year later lol)

  • Update 1 (May 21, 2025): made Metro's physical appearance more accurate, as well as added cannon allergies and beverage preferences. His general clothing attire has also been updated.

  • Update 2 (April 13, 2026): updated Hinus's and Mocean's names, Mozzy's, Hinus's, Mocean's, Minsation's and Mizzy's personas (holy shit were some of them super non-canon).

  • Update 3 (April 13, 2026): the stupid damn one-letter error in a tag >:(

  • Update 4 (May 10, 2026): Mico, Merktro, Macolation and HeartMakuroma added
creator: Ichego
